title: CrossRE: Cross-Domain Relation Extraction
description: Cross-domain relation extraction across 6 domains (news, politics, science, music, literature, AI). Annotators identify entities and label 17 relation types between entity pairs, enabling study of domain transfer in relation extraction.
citation:
@inproceedings{bassignana-plank-2022-crossre,
    title = "{CrossRE}: A Cross-Domain Dataset for Relation Extraction",
    author = "Bassignana, Elisa  and Plank, Barbara",

    month = dec,
    year = "2022",
    address = "Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics",

}
